items.title: [正面] If you like lovecraftian vibes and Slay the Spire ...
items.summary:
If you like lovecraftian vibes and Slay the Spire - inspired gameplay, you'll probably love this!
It's a really good game, made by a small but very passionate team.
Hidden gem. Heavily recommend!

items.title:
[负面] Greedy time-consuming ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥. Don't play.

Lack ...
items.summary:
Greedy time-consuming ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥. Don't play.

Lack of any kind of automation - auto is absolutely not usable, you have to do all the stuff manually.
Terrible UX especially while changing loadouts and you have to change them frequently since you have limited slots for them.
You need 8 copies of any character to make it work properly (and don't listen to guys saying that u need 1-4, it's a lie, it's a copium) and 16 to max it (which is a lot of money/time).
Devs themselves wanted to drop this game since they didn't have money at some point because nobody plays this ♥♥♥♥.
To survive with such low players count devs introducing more p2w to the already greedy game. Unique bonuses for maxed characters (16 copies). Pure p2w packages that provide years-worth of resources. FOMO packages.
Don't waste you resources like I did.

items.title: [正面] Great game! An anime card battler which is also a ...
items.summary:
Great game! An anime card battler which is also a gacha game, but it is very mercifull, you can unlock all characters for free. The stories are great, they mostly go into body-horror, lovecraftian horror, if you are a fan of Lovecraft you'll enjoy this game.
A lot of things to unlock daily too. And the battle animations look cool.
Recommend!

items.title: [正面] This is Slay the Spire card play expanded on 10x m...
items.summary:
This is Slay the Spire card play expanded on 10x mechanics within an amazingly well written horror lovecraftian narrative with gacha elements. It's honestly hard to believe but... it works so well.

The gacha elements are as always overwhelming at first and honestly a little annoying since some characters even in the same rarity are broken OP while others are pretty much useless, which is not helped by the fact that team composition is limited but oh well.

It's worth playing it even just for the story. I'm really impressed with this one
